subject: Cancel Culture is DANGEROUS

body:
Liberals in Washington and the mainstream media have tried to cancel me, censor me, expel me, shut me down, stop me from representing the great people [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5628f4044f24aa58df2841bb1ee7208&_e=aYIQmTlmKo-g9RYmCAeZs49YFVE4D-QNTQo3AFZsQ2EPu_rjHzjKNQkBtLg0ZZmp10i0R-DCeqXjOjR5Yr7-zMy8OKqzdUvJgA29gHiBSU6WYk-D1G7VLQEGQnk__UOdGp3nfSdgcckJlxjA0OScl4-1eZRMLTS2xpbzVFBXnjm8uBZ1qLt_8tGHNR2yNCd_uiK-anzlX7Hsdmo44x9ChSCtywWNrOrX7EvjF1F6uMR0LqPBvjkSML-Y8b-FN-mPy8ab7pMDK2joSIajJimOYyooLC5eMWh4VTuuXsmz1tfOJtV6Jn-9TnTA6r7s_9Gfgsqjd7b6n8voGzsvlZnTbjDS0gSEq466-sfxL-igJdA%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Liberals in Washington and the mainstream media have tried to cancel me, censor me, expel me, shut me down, stop me from representing the great people of Missouri and our country, but I am still here, and I will not bow down to the liberal mob.

**We must come together and stand up to liberal politicians and their friends in Big Tech and the media.** _**The future of our country — our freedoms — of speech, of religion — so much is at stake!**_
[**_Fight for Freedom_ \- DONATE HERE >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5628f4044f24aa58df2841bb1ee7208&_e=aYIQmTlmKo-g9RYmCAeZs5LRlNh8rBn7bRZu5Eb3IxEFz-hXEieqfQnKTuHOBnyHA0SPbq-hRQbWgkLvkMKHOOzu1FE5eSWVAG3qDEebNcdv0xT1XAluMVeq68piTcXG6_GXDVkNvRDjJAiZSv7g40brEIEoormvEj1HJ_5_2LJe1hlx2OIFnTr95Ps7hRxt_jWsGvrxcAJ6fBfGZqmirpzefi3ybvW7Z5RMkBqmIDQf5i2b91BQUthI5wwQi79DbSSISmg5hC5-_AvvXb79AN9nGzUNg_d16qs56r9yG9oTSnsnt9CxOPCORABkmm19RAUTuzKWXJeonUAM36apbi4Fpu_VPMlirN7K2YKwfSGig5pjO8TzBzOkRh-xl17tapkeGMZwfYb47i8qHfll2NqZ-8G_SS45F8O2eabZBg8%3D)
Liberals are trying to take away our First Amendment rights for having the gall to think and speak for ourselves.

They are trying to pass legislation to give Big Tech **MORE** power to clamp down on speech.

They want to use their power to give the media the ability to cancel whatever thoughts or ideas they disagree with.

**It’s time to get tough and stay strong._We must stand up for our rights!_**
[**Stand up - Stand strong -_Fight Back!_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5628f4044f24aa58df2841bb1ee7208&_e=aYIQmTlmKo-g9RYmCAeZs5LRlNh8rBn7bRZu5Eb3IxEFz-hXEieqfQnKTuHOBnyHA0SPbq-hRQbWgkLvkMKHOOzu1FE5eSWVAG3qDEebNcdv0xT1XAluMVeq68piTcXG6_GXDVkNvRDjJAiZSv7g40brEIEoormvEj1HJ_5_2LJe1hlx2OIFnTr95Ps7hRxt_jWsGvrxcAJ6fBfGZqmirh7bEiHV_gT1qbalWrys7iIF8NpwS5J4yL44dmpz6t7jH8grZKFsP51wHSvr2x8Ixa2bQdLnmV7hHZeIomyZ0LRRVFShe7C-8XCixwp9Gv0ylKyT7FOrQCkRZnnUiqRRit62yJ2ytXplziJU2RuiY8KNqDB_LT7AyIlJPD7yXvxuApn4PbQst4TMaem_AxEvGkRnBdk4kiMMurxgfRU2w4g%3D)
I will continue to represent **YOUR** voice in Washington.

I will continue to call out liberals and Big Tech.

_I will continue to ask the tough questions and fight to end cancel culture once and for all._

_**Left-wing politicians can’t stop me.**_

**But me and my team won’t be successful in this effort without your help!** Please donate what you can today.
[**Donate _HERE_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d5628f4044f24aa58df2841bb1ee7208&_e=aYIQmTlmKo-g9RYmCAeZs5LRlNh8rBn7bRZu5Eb3IxEFz-hXEieqfQnKTuHOBnyHA0SPbq-hRQbWgkLvkMKHOOzu1FE5eSWVAG3qDEebNcdv0xT1XAluMVeq68piTcXG6_GXDVkNvRDjJAiZSv7g40brEIEoormvEj1HJ_5_2LJe1hlx2OIFnTr95Ps7hRxt_jWsGvrxcAJ6fBfGZqmirsxgPdFHslaZSwCYy7ZBHzSLDARl7UwAccAHxbBSNs_SSO_4OyR5pGo1eSwlp3Sjk_9ciCy5uUdXIXS_Ml8h_PudFjXByjXMcvcQ1Wgxgpx0-QTky1F6bavlmHS6_ygAhuPEy3nMJV9k-IGngZqRiqkWjEtysgIV84nTDNRFHZfcQzto81EzWFEUHvwHxjubybKEJHn19nuT6sCeJletBY4%3D)

Josh Hawley

body:
Biden is punishing states who are using successful conservative policies

Friend,
**Biden is punishing states who are using successful conservative policies!**__

The current stimulus package is focused on bailing out BLUE states and punishing RED states for getting people back to work! Instead of focusing on opening our schools and businesses, Biden is sending taxpayer money to Democrat Governors - like Andrew Cuomo and Gavin Newsom - who have shut down their states.

**AND -- Speaker Pelosi decided to jam in her own pet projects that will cost MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars.**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of Mar. 8: Election fraud bill MUST be defeated in the Senate!
body:
| |
---
Well, we knew that the House was going to pass H.R. 1, i.e. the “destroy the country in one fell swoop” bill. The real fight is in the Senate, where it is technically known as S. 1.

Stopping this bill is an absolute must for anyone who loves freedom, even just a little bit.

**[Read through a summary of this monstrosity on our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb24taW50ZWdyaXR5Lz9taWQ9NDM0NjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=u2yGbGARPzWELiTx3EBXcQ) and use our [how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzQ2OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ObCVYvm2Ew_wha9sR8i1ug) to fight back, and make sure to share these resources widely. You can also learn more about the bill reading [this social media thread.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aHJlYWRyZWFkZXJhcHAuY29tL3RocmVhZC8xMzY3MzM5ODc4MzIxNjg0NDgwLmh0bWw_bWlkPTQzNDY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=uUH5I590kZUVkV--V1ni7Q)**

See below for this week’s related action item.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**CALL YOUR SENATORS**
There are two messages you need to give your Senators [when you call](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM0NjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=iQZU0-Ch0jUuqv_Ri6Kafg). Also, be sure to call with these messages whether your Senators are Republican or Democrat.

**1 .Tell them to vote NO on S. 1.** Tell them they must protect election integrity by voting no. No amendments can fix this bill. They must vote NO.

Bonus Action: If you have extra time, please call the following Democrats and tell them they must vote NO on S. 1.
* **Joe Manchin (WV)**
* **Mark Kelly (AZ)**
* **Kyrsten Sinema (AZ)**
* **Raphael Warnock (GA)**
* **Maggie Hassan (NH)**
* **Catherine Cortez Masto (NV)**

**2\. Tell them to reject Xavier Becerra as Joe Biden’s Health and Human Services Secretary.** You can read more about him (and sign the petition to show your opposition to his nomination) [on our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM0NjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JfTLp8Hf12yVjPJAUYGs0w)[,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM0NjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XWbjVNEmPtwOM6dweIkqgQ) and why he is so dangerous, before you call.

Thank you!
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDY3LTkwYjM5ZWJkOTMzNDQyNWU4MTY5Y2Q5OGI1N2Y2MjY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDM0NjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=2oywQH5Ceju-nH1peRH-0A)

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

clean_body: Now they want to cancel Dr. Seuss! &zwnj == == Friend, We've said it before and we'll say it again, the far left is crazy... one hundred percent. The far left's antics have gone on too long. Now they want to cancel Dr. Seuss! == Their wokeness knows no bounds, what will they cancel next? The American flag? Baseball? Hot Dogs? Or Football? Who even knows, we 're all so perplexed. While schools remain shuttered, and businesses failing, the far left is far more concerned with cancelling. Cancelling toys, and cancelling books, Oh the places they'll go, who knew they're such crooks? == I'm fighting to #OpenOurSchools, while the far left is acting like fools. We need a common-sense leader, not a woke culture ringleader. == If you're tired of games, and tired of woke culture, then add your name today to stop these woke vultures. I'm fighting for you, for your freedom, and rights. While the far left wants to cancel you... likely overnight. I won't back down no matter how tough, we've got to fight back or it'll be rough. == Together, we'll condemn the far left and their terrible plan. == -- Pete Snyder Get involved with Team Pete Today! Follow us on == and ==. == To receive text updates text PETE4VA to 47682. That's why I have authorized a == | == == ==** Friend, I unlocked this special offer for top supporters like you, so I hope you will take advantage of it. Now, your contributions will go even further to restoring common sense solutions to Washington and getting America back on track. == Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. body:
**" We need election integrity and election reform immediately."
President Donald Trump, CPAC 2/28/21 **
****
Friend,
We must look ahead to improve the security of our future elections, and regain the confidence of the American people in our democracy.
****[**SECURE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sE98Wm6-YoIyzPUnbxJe6MXVH28MHDu_rIHOur9ToMGx-rGwVycspiNd7umsa53h1C8mo3n5TY5YWSqpPKGCqMKPrtDxeoGRFLa2GWqfOTXR3xWJr-qEiJTlq5KOs5ciaiA0WvVWz-emYXszoufvzkRKfilLE7YkD-odC1JZ4KH_3jgbnrN62JNvYkaMiAPtFSbnMXvxRnalsyoPQ3PqDPVSNO6IhVVNmhxH3cDMOtzBvCKaazGW1zgwDRTf-Ka8sSEqZmC2j1x48Q22BHMzXiGcZ1hvPfMr3Ao0RD0RnBl-bE_fT71UPs8-k9i-yRCzHZWWJTzIp4tkM0dm5dIKlJsl3zQexAzDo64fSYdK_iXPoB-gICvUT0RwF-U0ZqOLkdYdQEttFhSoUZcHjh9u-g==&c=toJwNC3231puHWhCIwNlPmgziwcXbHlmX07gHSK6CBzDVXwEUm6H1A==&ch=35lNEC2YFekGs36IeTJMPwY1zGbNUL3dKvZOrE_-Xtz2ywSJjXzrYw==)****
****
**Unfortunately, Democrats want to move in the opposite direction.** All over the country, both on the federal and state levels, Democrats are pushing to erode election security laws, and further enable ballot harvesting and **CHEATING.**
**Why is this so hard? 1 PERSON=1 VOTE**
If we don't stop Democrats NOW, the outcomes of our elections -- and thus, the future of America -- could be determined by dead people, double voters, and those bent on undermining the integrity of our elections.

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're so proud to be in Congress during a time when more women are serving than ever before.

Happy International Women's Day, Friend!

We're so proud to be in Congress during a time when more women are serving than ever before. The Republican women we get to work with each and every day are truly an inspiration.

**Women who are pro-life, support the 2nd amendment and reject socialism are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be.** They dismiss us because we stand for the conservative values that are so harmful to their progressive agenda.

The radical left and mainstream media are constantly trying to paint GOP women in a negative light because we contradict their definition of what a woman should be and how she should think. That's why today, we're asking for YOUR help to support the GOP women who are fighting to protect our conservative values everyday despite the constant attacks from the radical left. Friend,

Hoosier women have been crushing barriers, breaking records, and blazing trails throughout history. In honor of International Women’s Day, we want to recognize some of them.

Check out this video to learn about a few of these inspiring Hoosier women:
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=9b0038c0024e4ad4a7ab55fcedd8d3ab&_e=jFuVCLU_8RYJlLqJME5KfMtxRIyR2o1Mt4qs1JD9w-psnDln71V465fkL8pM8urFAUsXtbjmBdoTaPLQ03c6W-diHB9A6AW3heedPqCDQc78V00EK8utHzZJaGzTHyehb7IToU5hR5PzA81vxtUqLyNTJgm3il5MBFEOxfgPsQ5Z7B93KB2AiLO1nqeziM4MlVUxy52z0oCJZffQzk221mADaxCsqdHycOHh-PfyCvk0QDl9OVUTI5J7QFSYMXvnqCZORh1RwA_rclXnh7O9JC4w4TaHgWKM1HBcBBDewvX38voRXLCO1TTp9idgqqVBYCqKGTLbegj-TAWGOIz1FClOX8pxKZZKpBF7zMvnufwOKZT1FpMenm-o9R4qTmrIrtwZR9vxFMn0gTtia-o2MUd2GgSKbNiBaFZop2OB_pF7ISfNzfwDSzg2sWSYxK7oBoA7gVMOb8aty4NRvafubsG_Gbpy0LybTPTAWDZx4i8VY2Vr9fEqsQvs6f9jyurB)
[**CHECK IT OUT**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=9b0038c0024e4ad4a7ab55fcedd8d3ab&_e=jFuVCLU_8RYJlLqJME5KfMtxRIyR2o1Mt4qs1JD9w-psnDln71V465fkL8pM8urFAUsXtbjmBdoTaPLQ03c6W-diHB9A6AW3heedPqCDQc78V00EK8utHzZJaGzTHyehb7IToU5hR5PzA81vxtUqLyNTJgm3il5MBFEOxfgPsQ5Z7B93KB2AiLO1nqeziM4MlVUxy52z0oCJZffQzk221mADaxCsqdHycOHh-PfyCvk0QDl9OVUTI5J7QFSYMXvnqCZORh1RwA_rclXnh7O9JC4w4TaHgWKM1HBcBBDewvXTOh_6XrDTMsV0my3NoIPl5mu1T6orCnsjbogd-p7-4EMPGCsI9g6qTEdkpOYhfnpI1loEIGjGjKWkZGa7CGq6P9X6U7lFk09yyV1MBlObOUQT3ASGnnENzYJMzotFrn5PGhEKP-rSJKQMB-llNIt9WV5KKLFs11XePrD7QjKT14EjZHJP6N-_g3YH9gFDgiRLzrB-F7kxOysO1eBDJ4uu)
These women made our state - and the world - a better place, and paved the way for the inspiring Hoosier women we know today.

**The innovation, bravery, leadership, and pioneering spirit of these women embody what it means to be a Hoosier Hero.** We want to teach folks across Indiana about these historic Hoosier women, but we can’t do it alone.

**That’s where you come in, Friend - will you help us spread the word by sharing this video on social media?**

body:

The Democrats have doubled down
Instead of letting up.
First, they canceled Dr. Seuss.
And now that's not enough.

This classic American author
Has been celebrated -- _revered!_
Now, he's been removed from Read Across America
Leaving much to be feared.

With one sweep of the pen
And one presidential proclamation,
The Democrats have ERASED
One of the greatest children's authors in our nation.

It really makes you wonder
Who's next on their "cancel" list.
If Dr. Seuss isn't safe,
Well, you get the gist.

To thwart the Democrats tirade,
We're calling on all patriots, near and far.
[**Claim your copy of "The Cat in the Hat" & Save Dr. Seuss**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010JM10TDaLXhcWmhJqpzIzF0lQmwmuDq2A_-sw13mUrWICn2jaKaoWG23UOUHCYsAI4pH6N--UMhjz-NUS4IG-bKUO9BnKwbAS6DY-wGUlIPMq7n_nbgHtmvOR8_i6hr9qTEflNRuZ0dLNdyLJqgU4bu_WhSZ9EcXduQkkJ06BAt3-ibwJNTW0F30UOtHWzT_6HUu1zwu6wUOvQ1hRwJNhZwTB-lEu3vQnH1_XNFxdiGnXKsrkgp5jhFJPsEu9diQMWvPQcjlfJTup2c0WjgcA3OLRPBs6QvchJpV39QDz_EbGcQv-A6_JcQEW9BKkGv971NEoDepM48_jPl59Y6brBO6oUNGJ5QJNkXTlGy908zIrzdch86TM3_Sm_p1j4zT45xvAXDN9IQRP0R2lblnmbHfCr8VuQv5bbAyCe-O3KeZ4XAoMbm1_0tnM82J3_wE_ocgKPwqcbddX2XmuUliF9M4FFb73pu9rRSClC30gXBVqHmRLrpLpiCDsfcxrLJLjTlTiUZ91twUNHNfdb2VvfyHy8Z0anyUF15h7NX68Igpq26x3qBo9bSzMD7JbQDY58XVVQmvOm8=&c=HDAiWi17SnFLelUVMz-xF4BFaLp7FbL0fhGx84VHfQB3St8zyheqSA==&ch=IjoB7Ci46VH2k0XEG0zsrHI1OTkc1FKTve5Dz09Pwxv_i0kOpiDQEQ==)
Before the Left says au revoir.

Censorship is wrong, dangerous.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Second chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Why do we spend billions of dollars on the prison industrial complex?
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210308-328-header&t=1&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve)
Peter,
**Meet Corry Sanders** — a Black business owner, church Deacon, father of four, and community leader from McKeesport, Pennsylvania. 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6984?refcode=em20210308-328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve)
In 2015, Corry was elected to the McKeesport City Council. The people of McKeesport thought Corry was the right leader for them.
**But because of a drug-related offense from _nearly a quarter century ago_ , Corry was barred from taking the city council seat he’d just won.** A stupid state law *that’s not unique to Pennsylvania* prohibits anyone convicted of a felony from serving in public office, Peter.
Pennsylvania and the rest of the country have incarceration down pat. We spend billions and billions of dollars on the prison industrial complex. Yet redemption, forgiveness, and renewal is just a tiny piece of that. _Why?_ 🤔 I’m determined to change this.
Nonetheless, Corry was determined to serve his community and he applied for a pardon in hopes of taking the seat. As a candidate in 2015, I was unrelenting in calling for Corry’s pardon and advocated for him publicly to receive a pardon.
Unfortunately, Corry’s application was denied. He did not receive a pardon for the decades-old drug offense. **So when I became Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania in 2019, one of the first things I did was encourage Corry to re-apply for a pardon.** Corry did, and under my leadership we were able to get a recommendation from the PA Board of Pardons to the governor’s desk.
Well, I’m grateful to say it: Governor Wolf recently signed Corry’s pardon!
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6984?refcode=em20210308-328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve)
**Peter, one of the things that I believe in strongly is the power of a second chance.** Delivering that for Corry and other Pennsylvanians has been one of the things I am most proud of.
In the two years since taking office, I’ve worked to reinvent + reimagine second chances in PA. After eliminating application fees, we’ve seen a ~500% increase in pardon applications. We have commuted more deserving lifers (folks serving Life without Parole) than in the previous 25 years combined. We’ve also established an expedited review process for low-level cannabis charges.
Recently, I worked to ensure that the Evans brothers from Philly, who served 37 years in prison, were granted clemency and freed. Additionally, I spearheaded the push to grant clemency to the Horton brothers from North Philly, who were sentenced to life in prison and have always maintained their innocence. Last month, they were granted clemency and freed from prison.
**I believe in second chances for Pennsylvania, Peter. I believe in second chances for Corry Sanders, the Evans brothers, and the Horton brothers. I believe in second chances for everyone.**
[**_If that’s the kind of leader you want to see in the U.S. Senate, will you chip in any amount right now to our campaign to help me keep fighting for second chances? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn't so important._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6984?refcode=em20210308-328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve) 🙏
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6984?refcode=em20210308-328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210308-328-footer&t=25&refcode2=328_434096_6ZOzve&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=328%2E434096%2E6ZOzve).
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211
